title.zh: 新增 Protocol 与 Lay 对照追溯审阅

en: Added sentence-level traceability mapping from lay output to source protocol evidence.
Added side-by-side review panel for lay sentence, source excerpt, and match score.
Extended generation API response with traceability payload for audit-ready review.
zh: 新增 lay 文案到 protocol 原文证据的句级 traceability 映射。
新增并排审阅面板：lay 句子、证据片段、匹配分数。
扩展生成 API 返回 traceability 结构，支持审计式审阅。
de: Satzgenaues Traceability-Mapping von Lay-Text zu Protocol-Evidenz integriert.
Side-by-side Review fuer Lay-Satz, Evidenz-Text und Match-Score hinzugefuegt.
Generation-API um Traceability-Payload fuer auditierbare Reviews erweitert.

title.en: Lay Language Synopsis EU Prototype Added
title.zh: 新增 Lay Language Synopsis（EU）原型

en: Added protocol/synopsis to lay-language generation workflow.
Added EU-oriented readiness checklist and readability hints.
Added English/German output mode with JSON export.
zh: 新增 protocol/synopsis 到 lay language 的自动生成流程。
新增面向 EU 的检查清单与可读性提示。
新增英文/德文输出模式与 JSON 导出。
de: Workflow von Protocol/Synopsis zu Lay-Language-Output integriert.
